description: A painting of a village square in Provence, dominated by a stone fountain at center. A woman sits on the fountain's edge. Tall plane trees with golden autumn leaves create a canopy above, casting dappled light on the ground. Pigeons are scattered on the cobblestones. Buildings are visible in the background through the trees. The palette is warm — golden yellows, browns, ochres, and soft greens. The atmosphere is quiet and sun-dappled.
